Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-08-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Steven J. Patti, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Lisa Pimentel, Patricia Rockett, Marcel Rockett, Christine Rockett, Bianca Rockett and Shirley Schwartz, who were not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant J.T. Thorpe & Son, Inc.
Default was entered against defendant on July 24, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, January 8, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed today, January 8, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Lisa Pimentel, Patricia Rockett, Marcel Rockett, Christine Rockett, Bianca Rockett and Shirley Schwartz, and against the Defaulted Defendant J.T. Thorpe & Son, Inc. as follows:

As to Plaintiff Lisa Pimentel:

Damages/Principal - $475,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $70,926.30.
Costs - $130.00, for a total of $546,056.30.

As to Plaintiffs Patricia Rocket, Marcel Rockett, Christine Rockett & Bianca Rockett:

Prejudgment Interest - $11,990.06.
Costs - $130.00, for a total of $12,120.06.

As to Plaintiff Shirley Schwartz:

Prejudgment Interest - $1,108.87.
Costs - $130.00, for a total of $1,238.87.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2008 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jan-20-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-22-2008 Continued To Nov-14-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
